rows.detailTitle: A "The remote server returned an error: (404) Not Found" Error Occurs When Running Workflows With Activities that Connect to Laserfiche Forms 10.2.1.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith A "The remote server returned an error: (404) Not Found" Error Occurs When Running Workflows With Activities that Connect to Laserfiche Forms 10.2.1. Product: Forms 10.1.1, Workflow 10.2 KB: 1013863 Published: May 23, 2017 Last Updated: May 23, 2017 Summary Workflows with Laserfiche Forms activities may be unable to connect to a Laserfiche Forms 10.2.1 server with the following error: The remote server returned an error: (404) Not Found You may see this error with the following activities: Invoke Business Process Retrieve Business Process Variables Set Business Process Variables Cause This issue can occur after upgrading to Laserfiche Forms 10.2.1 if the existing Laserfiche Forms installation is using HTTP communication. The default configuration for a new Laserfiche Forms installation expects secure connections and the upgrade process resets to this default configuration instead of retaining the existing configuration. Workaround Open the Laserfiche Forms Configuration page and reset the Use SSL connection option on the Forms Server page. Open the Forms Configuration page through the Start menu or by typing the URL in your browser address bar. The default URL for the Configuration page is http://machinename/FormsConfig, where machinename is the name of the server where Forms is installed. Click the Forms Server tab. Select and clear the Use SSL connection checkbox and save. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark

rows.snippet: An "Error 80040082" Error Occurs when Publishing a Packet with Multi-Page TIFF Reports. 19 years ago An "Error 80040082" Error Occurs when Publishing a Packet with Multi-Page TIFF Reports. February 12, 2007 | KB: 1011752 https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1011752/an-quot-err... https://support.laserfiche.com/kb/1011752/an-error-80040082-error ...
rows.title: An "Error 80040082" Error Occurs when Publishing a Packet with Multi-Page TIFF Reports.
rows.detailTitle: An "Error 80040082" Error Occurs when Publishing a Packet with Multi-Page TIFF Reports.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith An "Error 80040082" Error Occurs when Publishing a Packet with Multi-Page TIFF Reports. Product: Agenda Manager 7.2 KB: 1011752 Published: February 12, 2007 Last Updated: February 12, 2007 Summary When you attempt to publish an agenda packet with attached reports that are multi-page TIFF files, you may receive the following error message: An error occurred during agenda packet creation. Error: There was an error while creating the packet: Error occurred while appending report "YourReportName" of item "YourAgendaItem": Rebuild failed: Error reading string at file pointer 3; Original message: PDF startxref not found.. Error code: 0x80040082 Cause In certain situations, Agenda Manager did not generate a valid PDF file from multi-page TIFF files. Resolution There is a hotfix available for Agenda Manager 7.2. The fix is an updated version of AMServer.exe (version 7.2.0.101). To update Agenda Manager 7.2 Click the following link to download a zip file containing an updated version of AMServer.exe. Hotfix_SCR29299.zip Stop the Agenda Manager Service. Click Start and then click Control Panel. Double-click Administrative Tools. Double-click Services. Scroll down and select Laserfiche Agenda Manager Service. From the Action menu, point to All Tasks and click Stop. Replace your existing version of AMServer.exe with the updated version included in the zip file. By default, AMServer.exe is located at "C:\Program Files\Laserfiche\Agenda Manager Server." Restart the Agenda Manager Service. Click Start and then click Control Panel. Double-click Administrative Tools. Double-click Services. Scroll down and select Laserfiche Agenda Manager Service. From the Action menu, point to All Tasks and click Start. Share 2026 Laserfiche Privacy Trademark
